summary: The implementation successfully addresses the core stable storage requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5) and frontend integration (REQ-6, REQ-7). The backend uses a blob-storage mixin pattern and stable structures for persistence. Frontend components display media assets, handle uploads with progress feedback, and implement delete functionality with authentication checks. However, some requirements show incomplete or indirect implementation evidence, particularly around explicit stable memory structures and comprehensive authentication validation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend uses stable storage structures (e.g., stable HashMap) for blob data
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo file is truncated before showing the complete MediaAsset storage implementation. While the migration.mo file references Map.Map<Nat, MediaAsset>, the actual stable storage declaration in main.mo is not visible in the diff. Cannot confirm the use of 'stable' keyword or StableBuffer as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: uploadMediaAsset method validates file size constraints (5MB images, 10MB PDFs)
missing_requirements.reason: File size validation is only visible in the frontend (MediaUploadZone.tsx with MAX_IMAGE_SIZE and MAX_DOCUMENT_SIZE constants). The backend/main.mo file is truncated before showing the uploadMediaAsset method implementation, so backend-side validation cannot be confirmed.
File type validation (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, PDF) is only visible in the frontend (MediaUploadZone.tsx). Backend validation in uploadMediaAsset method is not visible due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Method requires valid Internet Identity delegation token
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend performs token validation (validateTokenAndRefresh function in MediaUploadZone.tsx), but the backend uploadMediaAsset method implementation is truncated. Cannot confirm backend-side authentication enforcement using MixinAuthorization or access control.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for MediaAsset schema changes (assetId to blobId field rename)
hallucinated_features.reason: The migration.mo file implements a data migration pattern for renaming 'assetId' to 'blobId' in MediaAsset records. This migration functionality was not requested in the BuildRequest, which only asked for stable storage implementation without schema evolution concerns.

A new BannerImagePicker component was added that filters media assets by filename containing 'banner' and provides dimension recommendations for main/CTA banners. While the BuildRequest mentions banner management in WebsiteSettingsPage, it did not specify creating a dedicated picker dialog for banner selection.

hallucinated_features.description: Dynamic banner loading in MainBanner and CTABanner components
hallucinated_features.reason: The MainBanner and CTABanner components were modified to dynamically load images from the media manager using filename matching ('Main Banner.png', 'CTA Banner.png'). While this integrates the media manager, the BuildRequest focused on upload/storage/display functionality, not retrofitting existing banner components to use the media system.
